title: The Factory Becomes the Target
description: Pages 16–16 focus on the factory becomes the target, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the restored victims, Franky, the Tontatta, and Doflamingo's officers converge on the Smile Factory as Dressrosa's rebellion spreads.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I never had any object- tions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...to con- trolling you all through fear....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now that you know the truth...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm sure there are many of you who desire to kill me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thus, I have prepared a "game". A game in which the goal is my death!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If you can take my life, naturally the game will be over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But there is one more way ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you take the lives of all of the indi- viduals...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: and I will pay a fine bounty for each of their heads!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Everyone in this country is now a bounty hunter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The only way to save your- selves... is to take the lives of others!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The curtain rises on a terrible specta- Cle...!!

summary: The Factory Becomes the Target develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
